Document:
# Vox
[color=#ff0000]Warning![/color] [color=#ffa500]This species is not recommended for new players due to their fatal allergy to[/color] [color=#c4f5ff]Oxygen![/color]
Vox breathe nitrogen, and [color=#c4f5ff]Oxygen[/color] is [color=#6730ff]toxic[/color] to them. Unfortunately, space stations as well as space vessels tend to be full of oxygen. Due to this Vox must use an internal nitrogen supply at almost all times as well as possibly retrofit their vessels to help avoid fatal exposure.
Vox always spawn wearing working nitrogen internals equipment. A spare breathing mask and an emergency nitrogen canister is provided in their survival box.
In addition to regular foods, Vox can also eat various snack packaging, banana peels, eggshells, and raw meat without any ill effects. They also like to drink welding fuel.
Vox slowly recover from low levels of [color=#6730ff]poison[/color] on their own, so long as they are careful not to exceed 25 damage. This allows them to endure breathing station air for up to thirty seconds at a time without lasting damage, letting them quickly eat, drink, take oral medication, and so on. A thirty second oxygen exposure takes them two minutes to recover from. If their health does not seem to improve within a minute of oxygen exposure, they should seek medical attention.
[color=#0041a8]Dexalin[/color] as well as [color=#4da0bd]Dexalin Plus[/color] are [color=#c4f5ff]Oxygen[/color] based, making these chemicals extremely [color=#6730ff]toxic[/color] to Vox.
[color=#77b58e]Ammonia[/color] as well as [color=#5d2fde]Dylovene[/color] have an added benefit of restoring [color=#a1e1ff]Asphyxiation[/color] and [color=#6b0007]Bloodloss[/color] in Vox.
Vox deal Slash damage with their unarmed attack.
